sources.weightG: Sony Asia spec page (Tier 1): 1215g without tripod mount
sources.lengthMm: Sony Asia spec page (Tier 1): dimensions D x L = 105 x 162.5mm
sources.frontDiameterMm: Sony Asia spec page (Tier 1): D = 105mm (barrel diameter)
sources.closeFocusM: Sony Asia spec page (Tier 1): minimum focus 0.4m (wide, AF/MF)
sources.imageCircleMm: Full-frame standard image circle (35mm full frame, 43.3mm diagonal); Sony publishes no image circle for this lens
sources.opticalElements: Sony Asia spec page (Tier 1): 12 groups / 18 elements
sources.filterType: Sony Asia spec page (Tier 1): 95mm screw-in front filter
sources.filterThreadMm: Sony Asia spec page (Tier 1): 95mm filter diameter
sources.isParfocal: Sony Asia spec page (Tier 1) SMO design: focus shift while zooming minimized by design; treated as parfocal
sources.hasFocusBreathing: Sony Asia spec page (Tier 1) SMO design: focus breathing minimized
sources.hasFrontRotation: Sony US product page (Tier 1): the front filter thread does not rotate; internal focusing design. Evidence of absence per POS-D10.
sources.focusRingRotationDeg: Focus-by-wire (RDSSM); no fixed or published focus ring rotation
sources.gearPitch: Power zoom with focus-by-wire, no cine gear ring; concept not applicable to this lens class (POS-D33)

fieldNotes.isParfocal: Sony SMO design minimizes focus shift while zooming; treated as parfocal.
fieldNotes.gearPitch: Photo/hybrid power zoom, no cine gear ring.
